subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-11-26 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: His name [the father of Ibn-i-Asdaq] was Mollah Salek Mogaddass. He was one of the learned men of Persia, and when he became a believer
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom
